title: Camouflage Blocks
description: Models with vanilla texture overlay, for masking with blocks
body:
![CAMOUFLAGE BLOCKS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf6449aee2aeed9ac7e208e62b899cc471824284.png)

### **🎨 CAMOUFLAGE BLOCKS — Hidden in textures!**  

**Create, disguise, surprise!** 🔥  

This mod adds **camouflage blocks** that blend perfectly with the textures of Minecraft vanilla blocks. Do you want a hidden door, an invisible trap, or a secret passage? Now it's possible!  

Originally conceived for creativity, the mod is now available in **Survival**! Below is everything you need to know.  

---  

### **🔹 Which block models are available?**  
Complete disguise arsenal:

![templates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c50eb43f87f19e54b33fa336100a6641a439faf5.png)


<details>
<summary>Names</summary>

- Stairs
- Slab
- Vertical Slab
- Wall
- Fence
- Fence Gate
- Door
- Trapdoor
- Pressure Plate
- Button
- End Rod
- Lightning Rod
- Carpet
- Pane
- Bars
- Composter
- Cauldron
- Chest
- Hopper
- Lectern
- Anvil
- Grindstone
- Flower Pot
- Decorated Pot
- Skull
- Cobweb
- Chain
- Candle
- Torch (classic, soul, redstone)
- Lantern (classic, soul, redstone)

</details>

**Do you want to play survival?** Crafting recipes are ready for you!  

---  

### **⚠ Attention: the mod is in the ALPHA version!**  
We are actively working on improvements, but bugs are possible. Your reports and ideas will help make the mod better!  

<details>  
<summary>Content from Winter Drop 1.21.4</summary>  

**Exclusive blocks** from update 1.21.4 will be in the main mode soon! They are still available in test mode.  

![Preview of new blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fabc7f8b5e2322642c9b6f231ba446a0bf105043.png )  

</details>  

<details>  
<summary>❗ Important warning</summary>  

**In future versions, the content may change or be deleted!**  
We warn you in advance so that this does not come as a surprise.  

</details>  

---  

### **💡 How do I get prescriptions?**  
Use mods like **[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei )**, **[REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei )** or **[EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi )** — they will show all the crafts.  

<details>  
<summary>📜 View recipes</summary>  

![Staircase Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a8e25fb4d1fe0e6c0c96cb639ad9be369c46f87.png )
![Recipe plates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c81ba5fc02321f00d3767dfa829846604e8c7e8.png )  

**Other blocks work the same way** — just replace the materials!  

</details>  

---  

### **🚀 Do you want to help with the development?**

🔹 **[GitHub](https://github.com/SayNooty/Camouflage-Blocks?tab=readme-ov-file)**  
🔹 **[Discord](https://discord.gg/drMcZXcGmR)**

**Ready for hidden construction?** 🕵️‍♂️✨
